scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix src/backend && npm install --prefix src/frontend && npm install --prefix src/mobile
scripts.build-mobile: cd src/mobile && npx expo prebuild --platform android --no-install && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd ../../../ && copy src\mobile\android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk exe\app-release.apk
